invariants: one approval authorizes one exact immutable revision
retries never duplicate an irreversible effect
budget reservation settlement release and adjustment conserve value
distributed rate authority cannot be bypassed per worker or process
accepted-but-unrecorded outcomes become ambiguous and reconcile before retry
success is impossible without the required accepted durable receipts
output receipt proof and accounting identify the same revision and effect
every partial state has a convergent resume repair or explicit manual terminal state
already-achieved desired state is classified explicitly
cross-account cross-assignment stale-authority and stale-entitlement fail closed
repair never erases accepted prior effects or invents completion
ws08_boundary: Crash repair, fault-injection seams, lineage, reconciliation, observability, and documentation groundwork only. No live-provider, target-host, pilot, or production claim.
open_architecture_liability: Generated production server string mutation remains; replace with typed server composition in a separate bounded source transaction.
